rationale: The citing paper is a journal-level editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated intellectual anchors are prior JMR review pieces (e.g., Huber et al. 2014; Tellis et al. 1999; Johnson 2006), not the cited paper’s image-engagement framework or methods. The match evidence is only a single DOI entry with no contextual quote, which is consistent with the cited article being listed as an example/recent article rather than substantively used.
